2605.23623.title: Adversarial Vulnerability Under Temporal Concept Drift: A Longitudinal Study of Android Malware Detection
2605.23623.paper_summary: We present a longitudinal, drift-aware evaluation of adversarial robustness across more than a decade of Android applications using static and dynamic feature representations extracted from emulator and real-device executions. The dataset is organized into yearly slices and evaluated under three deployment protocols that emulate realistic learning scenarios: (1) same-year training and testing, (2) cross-year deployment without model updates, and (3) expanding-window retraining with cumulative historical data. Across multiple classifier families, adversarial examples are generated using FGSM and SPSA under feasibility constraints. We measure clean performance, Adversarial Accuracy (AA), Attack Success Rate (ASR), and introduce temporal linkage metrics -- RobustDrop, $Δ$ASR, and Adversarial Amplification Factor (AAF) -- to quantify the relationship between distribution shift and robustness degradation.nResults show that temporal separation is associated with reduced adversarial robustness under the evaluated transfer-based feature-space setting. As the train-test gap increases, clean accuracy and adversarial accuracy decline, while attack success exhibits configuration-dependent increases, particularly under FGSM perturbations and static features. Expanding-window retraining mitigates, but does not eliminate, robustness loss under continued distributional evolution. These findings indicate that temporal drift should be considered when assessing the long-term robustness of intelligent detection systems under evolving data distributions and highlight the need for drift-aware robustness assessment frameworks in long-lived adversarial environments.
2605.23623.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一個長期的、考慮漂移的對抗性穩健性評估，涵蓋了超過十年的 Android 應用程式，使用從模擬器和真實設備執行中提取的靜態和動態特徵表示。該數據集按年度切片組織，並在三種模擬現實學習場景的部署協議下進行評估：（1）同年訓練和測試，（2）跨年部署不進行模型更新，以及（3）使用累積歷史數據的擴展窗口再訓練。在多個分類器系列中，對抗樣本是在可行性約束下使用 FGSM 和 SPSA 生成的。我們測量了乾淨性能、對抗準確率（AA）、攻擊成功率（ASR），並引入時間鏈接指標——RobustDrop、$Δ$ASR 和對抗增強因子（AAF）——以量化分佈變化與穩健性退化之間的關係。結果顯示，在評估的基於轉移的特徵空間設置下，時間分離與對抗穩健性降低相關。隨著訓練和測試之間的差距增加，乾淨準確率和對抗準確率下降，而攻擊成功率顯示出依賴於配置的增加，特別是在 FGSM 擾動和靜態特徵下。擴展窗口再訓練減輕了，但並未消除，在持續的分佈演變下的穩健性損失。這些發現表明，在評估智能檢測系統在不斷演變的數據分佈下的長期穩健性時，應考慮時間漂移，並強調在長期對抗環境中需要考慮漂移的穩健性評估框架。
2605.23623.author: Ahmed Sabbah et.al.
2605.23623.authors: Ahmed Sabbah, Mohammed Kharma, Radi Jarrar, Samer Zein, David Mohaisen
